title: Festuca trachylepis
taxonomy: Festuca trachylepis belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It is a species of grass that falls under the genus Festuca, which comprises various species of fescue grass. The species is further classified as being part of the subgenus Festuca, a grouping that includes several species of tall fescue grass. Additionally, it is a part of the section Trachyphyllum. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships.
uses: Festuca trachylepis is a species of grass, and its medicinal uses are largely unexplored or documented in available information.
